title: The Quest for Interoperability
summary: Viktor Mayer-Schönberger is Assistant Professor of Public Policy at the Kennedy School of Government, Harvard University. His work focuses on business, legal, and policy issues on the new economy. He is also an expert on the European Union, especially its regulatory framework and business-government relations. He holds several law degrees, including one from Harvard and an MS in economics from the London School of Economics.
